logger.doc:name: Meal Creation failed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: payload.request, error: error.description } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","items update failed",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-404", message: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}, originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid Body
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Payload received is invalid", userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","Validation Not Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-400", message: error.description replace("\n") with (" and "), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: PATCH meal failed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","PATCH meal failed",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "An error occurred updating meal item", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid Meal Id
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId, itemId: vars.itemId, } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","Invalid Id",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "MEALS-LOG-400", message: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: An error occurred deleting meals
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","An error occurred deleting meal",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "DELETE meal failed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid QueryParam
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Query Param received is invalid", userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","Validation Not Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "MEALS-LOG-400", message: error.description replace("\n") with (" and "), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid Meal Id
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","meal Id received is invalid",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "MEALS-LOG-400", message: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: An error occurred retrieving meals
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","An error occurred retrieving meals",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "An error occurred retrieving meals", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Meal Creation failed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: payload.request, error: error.description } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","items creation failed",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-404", message: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}, originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Invalid Request Items
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: payload.request } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","Invalid Request to create new meal",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "meal-400", message: error.description, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: Meal Creation failed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: payload.request, error: error.description } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","meal creation failed",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "Meal Creation Failed", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
